mapper.select: SELECT id, badge_name, description, icon_url, achievement_type FROM badges ORDER BY id
SELECT `쉼표번호`, badge_id, earned_at FROM user_badges WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} ORDER BY earned_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_badges (`쉼표번호`, badge_id, earned_at) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{badgeId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rest_logs WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND deleted = 0
